subcodes.first_line: O my God! These are Thy servants and Thy loved ones in Iraq, in whose inmost hearts the pangs of separation have grown intense [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی هولاء عبادک و احبائک فی العراق و اشتدت فی احشائهم لواعج الفراق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
